title: gymnogramma decussata
intro: Gymnogramma decussata, also known as the fern ally, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnogramma decussata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Gymnogramma decussata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
